adminSettings.title: System Settings
adminSettings.subtitle: Runtime controls for the AVG platform. Changes take effect immediately.
adminSettings.kycToggleHint: When ON, members can buy products without a verified KYC. KYC upload is still available.
adminSettings.payoutNote: Weekly payouts always require verified KYC + bank details, regardless of this toggle. This setting only affects the purchase gate.
adminSettings.welcomeEmailToggleHint: When ON, new members receive a welcome email with their Member ID and Sponsor ID upon registration.
adminSettings.otpToggleHint: When ON, members must enter a 6-digit code sent to their email after entering their password.

counters.qualifiedTooltip: Members count toward your rank only after their own team starts building.

ranks.fulfillmentNote: Rewards are verified and fulfilled by AVG admin.

auth.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please log in again.
auth.referralRequired: You need a referral link to join
auth.referralRequiredDesc: Ask your sponsor to share their referral link with you.
auth.name: Full Name
auth.termsAccept: I agree to the Terms & Conditions
auth.otpSentNotice: A 6-digit code has been sent to your email. Enter it below to continue.
auth.otpInvalid: Invalid code. Please check and try again.
auth.otpExpired: Code has expired. Please log in again.
auth.otpLocked: Too many failed attempts. Please log in again to get a new code.

errors.network: Cannot reach the server. Check your internet connection and try again.
errors.server: Server error. Please try again in a moment.
errors.tooMany: Too many attempts. Please wait a minute and try again.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

buy.termsLabel: I agree to the Terms & Conditions and confirm this purchase
buy.successTitle: You are now an Active Member!
buy.successBody: Your product purchase has been confirmed. You can now start building your network.
buy.awaitingPaymentInstructions: Transfer the exact amount via UPI or bank transfer and quote your Order ID in the remarks. Your account will be activated once our team verifies and confirms the payment.
buy.awaitingPaymentContact: Contact us on WhatsApp or call our support team and share your Order ID to speed up confirmation.
buy.alreadyActive: Additional purchase — does not create a second activation.
buy.kycRequired: KYC verification is required before you can buy. Upload your document and wait for approval.

profile.kycUploadHint: Upload a clear photo of your PAN or Aadhaar. Required before buying — reviewed by AVG management.

uploader.badType: Only JPG, PNG or WebP images are allowed

products.title: Product catalog
products.name: Name
products.priceHint: Excluding GST — 18% is added at checkout
products.activeHint: Visible on the member Buy Product page
products.priceInvalid: Enter a valid price in rupees
products.emptyDesc: Add your first product to show it on the Buy Product page

kyc.title: KYC Approvals
kyc.noDocs: No documents uploaded yet — verify only if checked another way.
kyc.emptyDesc: All KYC submissions have been reviewed.

members.noDocsWarning: No KYC documents uploaded yet — verify only if documents were checked another way.
members.kycReadOnly: KYC decisions are made by management on the KYC Approvals page.

orders.title: Pending Orders
orders.subtitle: Members who have placed an order and are awaiting offline payment confirmation.
orders.confirmHint: Enter the UPI transaction ID or bank reference that the member shared.
orders.paymentRefPlaceholder: e.g. UPI txn ref / bank transfer ID
orders.emptyDesc: All orders have been confirmed or are yet to be placed.
orders.confirmedEmptyDesc: Confirmed orders will appear here after payment is verified.

wallet.capNote: Weekly cap: ₹1,00,000. Excess is deferred to next week.

pairs.subtitle: ₹1,000 for you and every upline on each completed pair — released once you qualify
